text.message: Red has the whole board to play with. Gotta be him
Oj, I’ll save brick if you can cut red off the 6 ore spot
Your setup is too good for 1:1 trades
how do you not block the ows machine?
Lolol how are you doing this trade?
Refuse to block him and give him absurd 1:1 trades.. gg oj
Well done red. Gave him the game 🫡
And refuse to take road so he wins next turn. Just really really bad
You think it’s still me red?
You know you’re the road comp right red? Devs do nothing for you
That doesn’t get you road bud
Red, you gonna acknowledge you gave Orange the game?
red or blue gonna win now
On 9 with open settle. Fck off black
next time take road sooner red
